allow: Bash(python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf', fitz.__doc__[:40] if fitz.__doc__ else 'OK'\)")
PowerShell($n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($n\) { Write-Output $n.Source; node --version } else { Write-Output 'node NOT found' })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Killing PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on 8765" })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\User\\Downloads\\egely_wheel_02 \(1\).json"; $size = \(Get-Item $f\).Length; $j = Get-Content $f -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; [PSCustomObject]@{ SizeKB = [math]::Round\($size/1KB,1\); v=$j.v; fr=$j.fr; ip=$j.ip; op=$j.op; w=$j.w; h=$j.h; layers=$j.layers.Count; assets=$j.assets.Count; hasImages = \($j.assets | Where-Object { $_.p } | Measure-Object\).Count } | Format-List)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\ewr-bot-console\\measurements.json"; $info = Get-Item $f; "Size: {0:N0} bytes \({1:N1} MB\)" -f $info.Length, \($info.Length/1MB\); "--- first 600 chars ---"; \(Get-Content $f -Raw\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $info.Length\)\))

PowerShell($n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($n\) { "node: " + $n.Source; & node --version } else { "node: NOT in PATH" }; $np = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($np\) { "npm: " + $np.Source } else { "npm: NOT in PATH" }; "--- common locations ---"; @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { "FOUND: $_" } })
PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget: AVAILABLE \(" + $w.Source + "\)" } else { "winget: NOT available" })

PowerShell($node = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"; if \(Test-Path $node\) { "node.exe FOUND"; & $node --version; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" --version } else { "not at default path; searching..."; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\ewr-bot-railway"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $root, "$root\\src", "$root\\public", "$root\\sql" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\ewr-bot-console\\curves.js" "$root\\curves.js" -Force; "Created structure:"; Get-ChildItem $root -Recurse | Select-Object FullName; "curves.js size: " + \(\(Get-Item "$root\\curves.js"\).Length\) + " bytes")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\ewr-bot-railway"; npm install --no-fund --no-audit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
